Public Domain Resources

Sun, 29 Mar 2020 00:00:00 GMT by jrc03c

Here's a list of public domain resources that I hope to update regularly. If you know of any other good resources, or if you have any doubts about the goodness of any of these resources, please let me know!

Images

  • Old Book Illustrations
  • Rijksmuseum
  • Wikimedia Commons
  • Unsplash
  • Flickr Commons
  • Magdeleine
  • ISO Republic
  • Jay Mantri
  • The British Library
  • Europeana
  • Negative Space
  • The New York Public Library Digital Collections
  • Creative Commons Search
  • The Metropolitan Museum of Art

Music / Sound Effects

  • Free Music Archive
  • Freesound
  • Musopen
  • Choral Public Domain Library

Books & Audiobooks

  • Project Gutenberg
  • Standard Ebooks
  • Librivox

All / Miscellaneous / Meta

  • The Internet Archive
  • The Public Domain Review
  • Wikipedia: public domain resources

NOTE: Some of these sites contain materials that are not in the public domain.
